name: accsembly
description: An x86-16 assembler implemented entirely in HTML and CSS, executed via Playwright. The CLI does not compute; the stylesheet does.

scripts.test: node test/test.js && node test/differential.js 60 && node test/bootstrap.js 10
scripts.build:boot: node bin/accsembly.js boot/lexer.asm -q -o boot/lexer.com && node bin/accsembly.js boot/linker.asm -q -o boot/linker.com && node bin/accsembly.js boot/writer.asm -q -o boot/writer.com
